omitted_declarations.policy_reference:
Third-party marketing
We will get your express opt-in consent before we share your personal data with any third party for marketing purposes. Visit our consent manager where you can view and make certain decisions about your personal data use.

Legal/partner requirements
selfie, government ID images and extracted fields (name, date of birth, document number, issuing country, validity), device/technical metadata (e.g. IP, device identifiers), and verification outcomes (pass/fail, risk signals, provider references)
Where applicable, we conduct identity checks to comply with financial-crime and tax obligations or partner/vendor rules (legal obligation)
